members.member: @brief Defines the behavior of a \ref AkEventPlayable within a \ref AkEventTrack. \sa - \ref AkEventTrack - \ref AkEventPlayable
Check the playable time against the Wwise event duration to see if playback should occur.
@brief Defines the behavior of a \ref AkTimelineEventPlayable within a \ref AkTimelineEventTrack. \sa - \ref AkTimelineEventTrack - \ref AkTimelineEventPlayable
Check the playable time against the Wwise event duration to see if playback should occur.

member.name: F:AkTimelineEventPlayable.Editor.MinimumDurationInSeconds
member.summary: The minimum clip duration. This value is set to 1/60 of a second which generally represents the time of 1 frame.

member.name: M:AkTimelineEventPlayable.Editor.UpdateClipInformation(UnityEngine.Timeline.TimelineClip,AK.Wwise.Event,UnityEditor.SerializedObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates the associated clip information and the event durations.
member.returns: Returns true if the Wwise event is found in the project data.
